name: Johan Liebert
description:
﻿An open scenario. You can be anyone and have any relationship with Johan. Please indicate this in your first message or chat history.
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
The events take place in 1995 after Johan reread the book "The Nameless Monster," but had not yet planned to set fire to the library.

I decided to clarify that Johan is not a pure sociopath because of my own interpretation of his character and some Reddit posts that inspired me. For example, Everything Johan did was for Anna. (A "Monster" capable of love.) I also tried to make it clear that he has platonic love for Anna, because the AI likes to twist "loves his sister" into incest.

──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

✦ I would appreciate your suggestions and constructive criticism ✦


I have an idea to create an AU bot (How would Johan manipulate the masses using modern social media?), so if you like it, please leave a comment!

If you want better memory and preserving the characters' personality, use a proxy 🕊
creator: nopoint
